title: Modpack Base Modpack
description: Modpack Base Modpack is a simple modpack made for creating modpacks.
body:
# About
> Modpack Base Modpack(MBM) is a simple modpack made for creating modpacks.A modpack or project that aims to allow anyone to create modpacks.

# Included Mods
- _Depending on the version/loader, alternatives such as ports are used._
- _This modpack does not contain any mods that correspond to the quest mod._

# Notes

## Credits!
This Modpack was created based on [Hammer](https://modrinth.com/modpack/hammer) and [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop).(Rewriting config for compatibility)

## Useful Wiki and Docs

### Scripts mods
> CraftTweaker and KubeJS are mods that allow you to customize Minecraft using scripting languages. They are used in a vast number of modpacks and are considered essential tools that modpack creators would never want to part with.  
> While they can be challenging for first-time users, their usage is clearly explained in their respective wikis. Try starting with a tutorial to get familiar.\
> 
> **KubeJS Wiki**-https://kubejs.com \
> **Craft Tweaker Wiki**-https://docs.blamejared.com

### OptiFine Alternatives
> Most texture packs and shader packs that apply features like shaders, connected textures (CTM), custom entity models (CEM), and custom item textures (CIT) generally follow the format supported by OptiFine.  
> Alternatives to these have been compiled and listed by LambdAurora, the developer of LambDynamicLights ‚ÄĒ [**Mod Page (Modrinth)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights), [**GitHub Page**](https://github.com/LambdAurora)
> 
> **OptiFine Alternatives**-https://optifine.alternatives.lambdaurora.dev

### Other links
> https://docs.fancymenu.net \
> https://github.com/Faboslav/structurify?tab=readme-ov-file#%EF%B8%8F-in-game-configuration \
> https://www.mcjty.eu/docs/mods/control-mods \
> https://spark.lucko.me/docs \
> https://github.com/skywardmc/hammer/wiki \
> 

## Not included Mods
### FTB series
> Mods like FTB Quests, FTB Ultimine, FTB Chunks, and FTB Teams are undeniably essential for building and refining modpacks. However, unfortunately, these mods are not available as projects on Modrinth. Since they are also ARR (All Rights Reserved), they are not included in this modpack. 
> 
> If you're looking for an alternative to FTB mods on modrinth, check out this pack.\
> https://modrinth.com/modpack/bedrock-thinks-freely
